title: calceolaria undulata
intro: Calceolaria undulata, also known as the slipper flower or fairy bells, is a species of flowering plant in the calceolaria genus. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Calceolaria undulata include its ability to soothe coughs and relieve congestion, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Calceolaria undulata can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health enthusiasts.
